decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to build up a board of enchantments, particularly focusing on the Enchantress engine to draw cards and generate mana. The key strategy is to utilize cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile to draw extra cards, while using Serra's Sanctum to generate mana. The deck also includes combo pieces like Opalescence and Parallax Wave for additional win conditions. The overall goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a synergistic combination of enchantments and control elements to come out ahead in the match.

This deck focuses on using aggressive Goblin creatures to overwhelm the opponent. It includes powerful Goblin cards like Goblin Lackey, Goblin Warchief, and Goblin Ringleader to quickly build a board presence. Cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provide additional removal and reach to finish off the opponent. With a mix of direct damage, creature removal, and efficient creatures, this deck aims to rush down the opponent before they can stabilize. Wasteland and Rishadan Port provide disruption to slow down the opponent's game plan, while the deck also includes some utility cards like Naturalize for extra versatility.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through counterspells, removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, and disruptive creatures like Meddling Mage. It aims to draw cards efficiently with cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Gush, while using Psychatog as a win condition. The deck also includes disruption with Armageddon to slow down the opponent's mana development. With a mix of card draw, disruption, and a strong finisher in Psychatog, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a 1 vs 1 match.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent's resources and preventing them from being able to play any spells by utilizing cards like Stasis and Counterspell. It aims to control the game and disrupt the opponent's plans while setting up a win condition through cards like Black Vise. The deck also includes ways to draw cards and generate extra mana in order to maintain its lock on the game. Ultimately, the goal is to stall the game until the opponent is unable to recover, allowing for a victory.

This deck focuses on using enchantments to generate card advantage and mana ramp while controlling the board with enchantment-based removal. The key strategy is to play enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield. By combining this card draw engine with mana acceleration from cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, the deck aims to set up a powerful late-game win condition with cards like Opalescence and Replenish. The deck also includes interaction with opponent's threats with cards like Parallax Wave and Swords to Plowshares.

This Goblin Aggro deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive creature strategy. It includes key cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Ringleader to quickly get goblins onto the battlefield, supported by cards like Goblin Warchief and Siege-Gang Commander to buff and generate additional tokens. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to slow down the opponent's game plan. With a mix of direct damage, card advantage, and mana denial, this deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on assembling a combo using cards like Ill-Gotten Gains, Brain Freeze, and Lion's Eye Diamond to mill the opponent's deck and win the game. It utilizes various tutors like Intuition and Infernal Contract to find the necessary pieces quickly, while also generating mana with cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal. The deck also includes cards for card draw and disruption, such as Opt and Chain of Vapor. The strategy revolves around quickly assembling the combo and disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure a win.

The focus of this deck is to efficiently counter and disrupt your opponent's strategy while aiming to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a massive threat on the board. By utilizing card draw spells and control elements, the deck aims to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan until it can achieve a decisive victory. The inclusion of key cards like Counterspell, Foil, and Stifle ensures that the deck can handle a variety of threats while setting up its own win condition.

The main objective of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction to prevent the opponent from establishing a board presence. The deck aims to control the game until it can utilize cards like Fact or Fiction and Decree of Justice to generate card advantage and close out the game with powerful threats like Exalted Angel. The key strategy is to use Standstill to disrupt the opponent's plans while still being able to draw cards and maintain control of the game.

This deck focuses on using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for creatures that disrupt and control the opponent while also providing value. The deck includes various toolbox creatures such as Mesmeric Fiend and Spore Frog, as well as threats like Phantom Nishoba and Symbiotic Wurm. The deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through controlling the board and generating incremental advantage. The inclusion of Burning Wish also allows for added flexibility and access to a wider range of options to handle various situations.

The main focus of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deploy threats while disrupting the opponent with hand disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy. By utilizing powerful creatures like Graveborn Muse and Hypnotic Specter, along with efficient removal like Smother and Diabolic Edict, it aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The inclusion of Wasteland helps with mana denial and adds another layer of disruption to the strategy. Overall, this deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control throughout the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing Attunement and Intuition to quickly fill the graveyard with enchantments, then using Replenish to bring back powerful enchantments like Parallax Wave and Opalescence. With control elements like Decree of Silence and Mana Leak, along with disruption from Seal of Cleansing and Tsabo's Web, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a strong enchantment presence. The main win condition is establishing a lock with Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board while chipping away at the opponent's life total with Swords to Plowshares.

The focus of this deck is to quickly establish board control and disrupt the opponent's resources using efficient creatures and land destruction, while also generating advantage through cards like Sylvan Library. The Terravore serves as a powerful finisher, growing in size as lands are destroyed. The deck aims to pressure the opponent's board state and mana base, using Cataclysm to further disrupt their plans. The mix of aggressive creatures, land destruction, and disruption spells create a formidable Aggro - Terrageddon strategy in a premodern 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on using a combination of cards to quickly get out the Phyrexian Dreadnought creature, while also utilizing counterspells, card draw, and control spells to protect the combo. Key cards like Stifle and Portent help to both stall opponents and set up the combo, with alternative win conditions available if needed. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately winning through a powerful and difficult-to-interact-with creature.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to win the game in a single turn. The deck includes a variety of cheap cantrips and counterspells to efficiently cycle through the deck and protect the combo from disruption. The inclusion of cards like Flash of Insight and Vision Charm allows for additional card selection and versatility. With the right sequencing and timing, this deck aims to outsmart opponents and secure a quick victory through its powerful combo interaction.

This deck focuses on using enchantresses to draw cards and ramp up mana, while utilizing enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to create a lock on the board. It also includes cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing to protect its own enchantments and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to consistently draw cards and generate mana to set up for a win condition such as overwhelming the opponent with creatures from Opalescence or locking them out of the game with Parallax Wave and Solitary Confinement.
